{{Quote|Keep your eyes peeled, this place is crawling with Rebel scum.|Gortz|<ref name="Protazk" />}}
'''Gortz''' served in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. He was the [[driver]] of [[Hammer 3:2]], a [[Hovertank/Legends|repulsortank]] in the [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit]] commanded by [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Arbmab/Legends|Arbmab]]. He served in the [[Assault on Protazk|assault]] on [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] forces on [[Protazk]]<ref name="Protazk" /> during the [[Kwymar Suppressions/Legends|Kwymar Suppressions]].<ref name="Hunt">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swminis/article/huntwithin1|text=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 1|int=The Hunt Within: Valance's Tale: Part 1}}</ref>
